heading: About The Author
text: (Bradley Congelio) currently Assistant Professor College Business Kutztown University Pennsylvania. main area instruction Data Analytics, well teaching popular Sport Analytics (SPT 313) course.earned Ph.D. University Western Ontario also received specialized certificate R Data Analytics University California, San Diego 2021. proud undergraduate alumni West Liberty University strong advocate broad-based liberal arts education.research focuses using big data, R programming language, analytics explore impact professional stadiums neighboring communities. use proprietary Zillow ZTRAX database well U.S. Census forms data create robust, applied, useful insight best protect living areas stadiums proposed construction.well, work sport analytics, specifically NFL, featured numerous media outlets, including USA Today Sports Illustrated.Finally, recent academic, peer-reviewed publications include:Congelio, B.
